title: The secret to great wine? Ancient volcanoes
description: Winemakers are flocking to vineyards planted on red soils, prizing the iron-rich basalt, weathered over eons, for the distinctive flavour it gives their drops.

title: Platypuses Swam with Dolphins 25 Million Years Ago, Reveals ‘Exciting’ Fossil Find
description: Everyone knows that the platypus is the world’s strangest mammal, obeying conventions as well as Alice Cooper or Ozzy Osbourne ever did. But an “exciting” new fossil is revealing more about this ancient lineage’s long history: namely some serious gnashers. Paleontologists made the rare discovery east of the Flinders Ranges in the remote outback of [...] The post Platypuses Swam with Dolphins 25 Million Years Ago, Reveals ‘Exciting’ Fossil Find appeared first on Good News Network .

title: Quote of the day by Socrates: 'By all means, marry. If you get a good wife, you’ll become happy; if you get a bad one, you’ll become a philosopher.' - ancient quote on marriage that still feels shockingly modern
description: Socrates' famous marriage quote, "By all means marry. If you get a good wife, you’ll become happy; if you get a bad one, you’ll become a philosopher," offers a profound insight into personal growth. It suggests that both positive and challenging relationships can lead to self-reflection and wisdom, aligning with his belief that an unexamined life is not worth living.
